title: Deferred retirement
doc_html:
§1452. Deferred retirement

            If the services as an employee or assessor of any member who has twelve or more years of credited service are terminated prior to the time that the member becomes eligible for normal retirement, the former member may leave his contributions in the fund and, upon attaining the age required under the provisions of R.S. 11:1421, the former member shall be eligible for a regular retirement benefit.

            Acts 1989, No. 545, §1, eff. July 5, 1989; Redesignated from R.S. 47:8066 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991; Acts 2024, No. 47, §1, eff. May 15, 2024.
doc_text:
§1452.  Deferred retirement
If the services as an employee or assessor of any member who has twelve or more
years of credited service are terminated prior to the time that the member becomes eligible
for normal retirement, the former member may leave his contributions in the fund and, upon
attaining the age required under the provisions of R.S. 11:1421, the former member shall be
eligible for a regular retirement benefit.
Acts 1989, No. 545, §1, eff. July 5, 1989; Redesignated from R.S. 47:8066 by Acts
1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991; Acts 2024, No. 47, §1, eff. May 15, 2024.
